name: x squared = lie
author: BigBrainBen10
bootlegger: There will ALWAYS be 1 to 3 mathmatician(s). One of the extras is poisoned. if there are 2, split them into drunkness + special and poison + special. if there are 3, add a regular mathmatician to the case of 2 mathmaticians. either way, tell every mathmatician what they detect at the start of the game, even if there's 1.
For the Sweetheart's ability, replace "drunk" with "poison".

The Acrobat's effect is instead: "at the start of the game, three players are shown to you; one of them is THE drunk. Each* night, choose three players; you will know how many of them are drunk or THE drunk."
